name: Celery Seed Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Celery Seed OR Poppy Seed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except oil and seed in a blender container.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Slowly add oil while continuing to blend on low speed.
4. Stir in the seeds.
5. Chill to allow flavors to blend.
Makes about 1 cup.
Suggested Serving: Serve with various fresh fruit salads.
